name: Telegram Channel
author: Resonant Alpha
description: Connects one or more Telegram bots to Augmentor as trusted conversation channels with local transcript mirroring.

surfaces.label: Telegram Routing
surfaces.description: Manage bots, route mappings, and channel health.

workflowBoundaries.label: Telegram Strategist channel
workflowBoundaries.jobToBeDone: Connect Telegram bot endpoints to Augmentor as conversation channels under the same Strategist identity.
workflowBoundaries.userValue: The human can talk to Augmentor away from the desktop while channel state and provider routing remain in ResonantOS.
nonGoals: Create a separate trusted agent identity
Expose raw provider credentials to Telegram
Write trusted archive pages from Telegram directly

skills.name: Remote channel conversation
skills.description: Handle Telegram messages as channel sessions while preserving Strategist identity, memory scope, and provider policy.

connectors.name: Telegram Bot API
connectors.description: Connects to Telegram through host-managed bot credentials and allowed chat/session mapping.

scripts.name: Telegram connectivity check
scripts.description: Verify bot token configuration and channel service state before enabling the Telegram channel.
